summary: No closures or merge/fix actions are safe for this cluster. #47162 remains the canonical open PR for Python/shell skill-scanner coverage, while #43469 and #60456 are related scanner-hardening PRs with distinct scopes and unresolved review/check blockers.

actions.reason: Representative #47162 remains the best canonical path for the Python/shell coverage subcluster, but this dedupe-only job blocks merge, fix, and raise_pr actions and the PR still has check/review blockers.
